appearance.hair: Long purple hair, loosely tied at nape
appearance.clothing: White loose shirt, black suit jacket, black casual pants, sneakers.

char_background.origin: Awakened 牵丝 at an early age, used it to coast through university. Passed the 狩灵协会 assessment and joined 狩灵协会4科, where her ability found a legitimate purpose.
char_background.current_mission: Intelligence gathering for 狩灵协会4科.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-牵丝: Projects 灵力 as thin resilient threads for tracking, monitoring, binding, and cutting.
